vocab.meaning: sự hối hả và nhộn nhịp
vocab.example: I occasionally enjoy immersing myself in the hustle and bustle of a local market to feel the city's energy.

vocab.meaning: những nơi xa xôi hẻo lánh
vocab.example: On weekends, I prefer escaping to the far-flung corners of the countryside where silence is the only sound.
A quiet afternoon in a library is the perfect way for me to recharge my batteries after a long week.

vocab.meaning: đời sống ban đêm sôi động
vocab.example: I’m drawn to the vibrant nightlife of the city center when I want to celebrate a special occasion with friends.

vocab.meaning: sự yên bình không bị làm phiền
vocab.example: I seek out hidden cafes that offer undisturbed peace, allowing me to get lost in a good book.

vocab.meaning: tiếng gầm rú đinh tai nhức óc
vocab.example: The deafening roar of the crowds at a football stadium can be incredibly exhilarating on a Saturday night.

vocab.meaning: sự tĩnh lặng và bình yên
vocab.example: Most of the time, I value my peace and quiet, so I steer clear of overly commercialized areas.

vocab.meaning: người hướng ngoại, thích giao thiệp
vocab.example: As a bit of a social butterfly, I tend to gravitate toward lively bars where I can meet new people.

vocab.meaning: khung cảnh yên tĩnh, thanh bình
vocab.example: There’s nothing like the tranquil setting of a botanical garden to clear one's mind.

vocab.meaning: sự tương phản hoàn toàn/rõ rệt
vocab.example: The serenity of the park provides a stark contrast to the chaotic traffic of the surrounding streets.
